message:
test(metamorphic,bd-pdg22): pin date_range + empty-DB stats invariants

Extends tests/metamorphic_stats.rs (which already pinned the sum
invariant via 5v5b4) with the remaining two pdg22 items:

(2) date_range.oldest <= newest invariant — when stats reports a
    date_range with both oldest + newest present, oldest MUST be
    chronologically <= newest. ISO-8601 strings sort
    lexicographically by chronology so string comparison is valid.
    Catches a regression that swaps the two or uses MIN where MAX
    was intended. Mixed (one present + one absent) is also a
    contract violation.

(3) empty data-dir produces zero counters — cass stats --json
    against a fresh data dir with no indexed sessions MUST emit
    conversations=0, messages=0, and an empty by_agent array (or
    a structured error envelope on STDOUT per the post-hd89i
    contract). Catches a regression that emits null/missing/sentinel
    values for the empty case.

Two new tests:
- mr_stats_empty_data_dir_produces_zero_counters_or_structured_error
- mr_stats_date_range_oldest_lte_newest

Together with the existing mr_stats_total_equals_sum_of_by_source
(5v5b4), all 3 pdg22 metamorphic invariants are pinned.

Closes coding_agent_session_search-pdg22.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
